rulings.Case Title: BAYER, ALAN, AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF et al VS. FREDERICK A. MORSE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatory 15.1 From Defendant Mills, And For Sanctions For Discovery Abuse Against Defendant Arthur Mills And Attorney-Of-Record Henry Wirta
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 22, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFF ALAN BAYER'S Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatory 15.1 From Defendant Mills, And For Sanctions For Discovery Abuse Against Defendant Arthur Mills And Attorney-Of-Record Henry Wirta. GRANTED. Defendant shall serve responses to Form Interrogatory 15.1 (each subsection as to each denial with responsive documents identified by bates number if documents are used to respond to a particular question) within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,860. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAYER, ALAN, AN INDIVIDUAL, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF et al VS. FREDERICK A. MORSE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Notice Of Deposition And For Protective Order Re : Re Scheduling Deposition;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 22, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFF PHYLLIS GROSZ'S Motion To Quash Notice Of Deposition And For Protective Order Re: Re Scheduling Deposition. DENIED. Deposition shall proceed on a mutually agreeable date to commence no later than November 10, 2014. Request for production is reasonably particular. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,200. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JANECEK VS. MIKE TAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Attendance Of Lisa Tam At Deposition; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 22, 2014, Line 2: PLAINTIFF REBECCA JANECEK'S Motion To Compel The Attendance Of Lisa Tam At Deposition; Request For Sanctions. Continued to September 24, 2014 to be heard with other pending motions. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: REBECCA JANECEK VS. MIKE TAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Concerning The Order Of Depositions; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 22, 2014, Line 2: PLAINTIFF REBECCA JANECEK'S Motion For Protective Order Concerning The Order Of Depositions; Request For Sanctions. Continued to September 24, 2014 to be heard with other pending motions. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONA T FONG VS. SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 22, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANTS SERGIO LAINEZ, MAGALY SILVA, and PRISCILLA SILVA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice compliance with Ellis Act and SFRO requirements. Request for damages occasioned by tenants' failure to vacate per the Ellis Act notice does not render the Complaint deficient or uncertain. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XELAN PROP I LLC VS. MARIA MARANGHI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 22, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT MARIA MARANGHI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.3.1112, no demurrer and no points and authorities filed with the Second Amended Notice of Hearing. The prior demurrer filed on August 22, 2014 and set for hearing for September 11, 2014 has been taken off calendar per written request of the moving party on September 9, 2014 before the instant notice of motion was filed and cannot be used to support this motion. Defendant should have filed a complete motion in accordance with CRC 3.112. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNY ZHAO VS. JUAN JOSE LARA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 22, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT JUAN LARA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, complaint /notice sufficiently alleges exemption from SFRO. =(501/REQ)
